evidence.quote: Town houses need a strong strategy for waste storage that is located to the front of the property.

records.title: 不活跃的街道界面
records.summary: 不活跃的街道界面，包括空白立面、面向街道的服务场地和模糊的底层窗户，会消除自然监视并降低活力。
actions: 避免不活跃的街道界面
constraints: 街道界面应活跃，避免空白立面、服务场地面向街道和模糊窗户

evidence.quote: 3Rd. Inactive street edges, including blank elevations, service yards facing the street and obscure ground floor windows that remove natural surveillance and reduce vibrancy.

records.title: 支持需求响应式交通
records.summary: 应支持需求响应式交通、汽车俱乐部和汽车共享。

evidence.quote: 2Gi. Support Demand Responsive Transport, car clubs and car sharing.

records.title: 安全过街设施
records.summary: 应提供安全过街设施：斑马线、平行线和信号灯。

evidence.quote: 2Gf. Provide safe crossings: zebra, parallel, and signalised.

records.title: 混合户型在形式和材料创造明显节奏时效果最佳
records.summary: 混合户型在形式和材料创造明显节奏时效果最佳。
constraints: 形式和材料应创造明显节奏

evidence.quote: A mix of house types works best when form and materials create an obvious rhythm.

records.title: 建筑布局与绿色空间的关系
records.summary: 当用地毗邻绿色空间时，应将建筑布置在边缘以提供丰富的自然景观视野。
constraints: 提供丰富的自然景观视野

evidence.quote: When a plot borders green spaces place the building to the edge to provide rich views of natural landscape.

records.title: 避免过度依赖工程化的雨水衰减池
records.summary: 雨水管理不应过度依赖高度工程化的衰减池。
prohibited_actions: 过度依赖高度工程化的衰减池进行雨水管理

evidence.quote: 1Rg. Storm water management that is too dependent on highly engineered attenuation basins.

records.title: 管理雨水靠近落点
records.summary: 使用雨水花园等特征管理雨水靠近落点。

evidence.quote: Manage water close to where it falls using features such as rain gardens.

records.title: 平衡“移动”与“场所”功能
records.summary: 街道应作为停留的场所，而不仅仅是通行的走廊。

evidence.quote:
b. Balance ‘movement’ and ‘place’. Streets should function
                          as places to be, not just corridors to travel through.

records.title: 不要提供孤立且缺乏自然监视的汽车停车位
records.summary: 不要提供孤立且缺乏邻近住宅自然监视机会的汽车停车位。
prohibited_actions: 提供孤立且缺乏自然监视的汽车停车位

evidence.quote: Do not provide car parking where it is isolated and lacks natural surveillance opportunities from neighbouring homes.

records.title: Oversized corner radii on residential streets
records.summary: Oversized corner radii on residential streets allow drivers to turn at high speed, which is unsafe.
constraints: Corner radii on residential streets should not be oversized to prevent high-speed turns.
prohibited_actions: Designing oversized corner radii on residential streets that let drivers turn at high speed.

evidence.quote: 2Rd. Oversized corner radii on residential streets that let drivers turn at high speed.

records.title: A genuine mix of housing typologies
records.summary: 真正的混合住宅类型应反映当地住房需求和政策，有助于创建平衡、包容的社区。
constraints: reflects local housing needs and policies
helping to create a balanced, inclusive community

evidence.quote: 4Gc. A genuine mix of housing typologies that reflects local housing needs and policies, helping to create a balanced, inclusive community.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 积极处理树篱，避免生硬布局
records.summary: 应积极处理树篱，避免简单绕开现有树篱导致别扭或不实用的布局；在某些情况下，新树篱或林带可能带来更好的生物多样性和结构。
constraints: 避免别扭或不实用的布局
prohibited_actions: 简单绕开现有树篱导致别扭或不实用的布局

evidence.quote: i. Treat hedgerows positively. Avoid simply working around existing hedges if it creates awkward or impractical layouts. In some cases, new hedgerows or tree belts may deliver greater biodiversity and a better structure.

records.title: 智能使用标准户型
records.summary: 标准户型可以通过智能使用帮助创造特色：重复它们以建立节奏，将它们分组为连贯的集群，关注它们如何框定街道和公共空间。高质量的公共领域、景观和边界处理可以在没有施工风险或不必要成本的情况下提供特色。
constraints: 关注如何框定街道和公共空间
高质量的公共领域、景观和边界处理

evidence.quote: e. Use standard house types well. Standard types can help create character when used intelligently: • repeat them to establish rhythm, • group them in coherent clusters, • focus on how they frame streets and public spaces. • High-quality public realm, landscape and boundary treatments can deliver character without construction risk or unnecessary cost.

records.title: 避免缓冲区产生不良空间
records.summary: 避免新旧开发之间的缓冲区产生不必要的走廊或后花园之间的空间。
prohibited_actions: 产生不必要的走廊或空间

evidence.quote: Buffer zones between new and existing development that create unwanted corridors or spaces between back gardens, whether accessible or not.

records.title: 孤立地块的非住宅建筑
records.summary: 非住宅建筑作为孤立地块交付，各自带有后退街道的地面停车场，形成车辆主导、不连贯的场所。
actions: 避免将非住宅建筑作为孤立地块开发
constraints: 建筑应与街道保持联系，避免车辆主导的不连贯场所

evidence.quote: 3Rb. Non-residential buildings delivered as isolated parcels, each with its own surface car park set back from the street, creating vehicle dominated, disconnected places.

records.title: 精心组合的街道和建筑群
records.summary: 通过建筑的位置、体量和相互关系，营造独特的空间特征。
actions: 精心组合街道和建筑群

evidence.quote: 7Ge. Well composed streets and building groupings where placement, massing and relationships between buildings contribute to a distinctive spatial character.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 识别关键视线以指导布局和特征
records.summary: 应识别进入、离开和穿越场地的关键视线，以便为布局和特征提供信息。

evidence.quote: c. Identify key views into, out of and across the site so they can inform the layout and character.

records.title: Use shared and unallocated parking
records.summary: 在街道中设计共享和未分配停车位，创造灵活性并更高效利用土地。
constraints: make more efficient use of land

evidence.quote: d. Use shared and unallocated parking. When designed into the street, shared spaces create flexibility and make more efficient use of land.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 借鉴积极的地方特征以反映和强化地方特色
records.summary: 应借鉴积极的当地特征，如街道模式、景观特征、城市肌理、地块形状和建筑形式，利用这些底层元素而非表面风格来反映和强化地方特色。
constraints: 利用底层元素而非表面风格

evidence.quote: 5Gc. Drawing on positive local characteristics such as street patterns, landscape character, urban grain, plot shapes and building forms. Use these underlying elements rather than superficial styling to reflect and reinforce local character.

records.title: 高大建筑围合大空间
records.summary: 较高的建筑有助于围合和界定大型空间。

evidence.quote: Taller buildings help enclose and define large spaces.

records.title: Design for vulnerable users
records.summary: Consider access needs for disabled people, older residents and others facing barriers; avoid physical barriers and ensure quality surfacing, lighting and overlooking.
constraints: Design must consider access needs for vulnerable users, avoid physical barriers, and ensure quality surfacing, lighting, and overlooking.
prohibited_actions: Creating physical barriers that hinder access for vulnerable users.

evidence.quote: j. Design for vulnerable users. Consider access needs for disabled people, older residents and others who may face barriers to using facilities and public spaces. Avoid physical barriers, and think about the quality of surfacing and the need for lighting and overlooking.

records.title: 自信地使用结构性景观
records.summary: 自信地使用结构性景观，帮助建立令人难忘的、独特的场所身份。

evidence.quote: 6Ge. Structural landscaping used confidently to help establish a memorable, distinctive place identity.

records.title: 过度依赖串联停车
records.summary: 过度依赖串联停车，不方便且常未按预期使用。
prohibited_actions: 过度依赖串联停车

evidence.quote: 10Rf. Excessive reliance on tandem parking, which is inconvenient and often unused as intended.

records.title: 整合种植、水和生物多样性策略
records.summary: 将这些元素直接整合到交通网络中，提升街道和空间对人和野生动物的价值和性能。
actions: 将种植、水和生物多样性策略整合到交通网络中

evidence.quote: c. Combine planting, water and biodiversity strategies. Integrate these elements directly into your movement network. This approach enhances the value and performance of streets and spaces for both people and wildlife.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 利用现有建筑在新绿地中创造焦点
records.summary: 利用现有建筑在新绿地中创造焦点。

evidence.quote: An existing building is used to create a focal point within new green space.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 踏勘场地以理解特征并指导设计
records.summary: 应踏勘场地以理解其特征，亲眼观察独特特征、视线和模式如何塑造新开发的设计。

evidence.quote: 5Ga. Walking the site to understand its character, seeing first hand how distinctive features, views and patterns can shape the design of a new development.

records.title: SuDS、树线和树篱与行人路线结合
records.summary: SuDS、树线和树篱应与行人路线结合，以改善步行和骑行体验，同时支持自然恢复和应对气候变化。

evidence.quote: SuDS, tree lines and hedges should combine with pedestrian routes to improve the walking and cycling experience while supporting nature recovery and tackling climate change.

records.title: 避免设计不良的街角
records.summary: 避免设计不良的街角，包括空白侧立面、角落车库或长段围栏或围墙围合后花园。
prohibited_actions: 设计不良的街角

evidence.quote: Poorly designed street corners, including blank side elevations, garages on corners, or long runs of fencing or walls enclosing back gardens.

records.title: 询问社区珍视的当地建筑和景观
records.summary: 询问社区他们珍视的当地建筑和景观，并将其用于设计灵感。
constraints: 使用社区珍视的元素作为设计灵感

evidence.quote: 6Gb. Ask the community what they cherish in their local buildings and landscapes, and use that for your design inspiration

records.title: 避免车辆主导的走廊
records.summary: 避免因限制正面通道而形成的车辆主导走廊，破坏以人为主的街道。
prohibited_actions: 限制正面通道导致车辆主导走廊

evidence.quote: Distributor roads with restricted frontage access, creating vehicle-dominated corridors and undermining active, people-focused streets.

records.section: 12. Back of pavement, front of home
records.title: 前院空间促进社交
records.summary: 前院空间应促进社交，为居民提供个性化立面和与邻居互动的机会。

evidence.quote: 12Ge. Front garden spaces that foster sociability, offering small opportunities for residents to personalise their frontage and interact with neighbours.

records.title: 主动出行与ATE
records.summary: 2020版设定了主动出行所需内容。此后，Active Travel England (ATE) 成为150户及以上规划申请的法定咨询机构，LTN 1/20已发布。本版提供更多主动出行示例，ATE已加入BHL Partnership。

evidence.quote: The 2020 version set out what was needed for active travel.  Since then, Active Travel England (ATE) has become a statutory consultee for planning applications of 150 or more homes, and Local Transport Note 1/20 has been published. This version provides more examples of active travel, and ATE have joined the BHL Partnership.

records.section: 8. Easy to find your way around
records.title: 关键临街面需要强烈模式才能成为难忘特征
records.summary: 关键临街面（如公共空间）如果由没有强烈模式的住宅类型组成，将不会令人难忘。

evidence.quote: Key frontages such as those to public spaces will not be memorable if they are comprised of house types where there is no strong pattern.

records.title: 避免切断现有自然连接
records.summary: 不应切断高质量的现有树篱等自然连接，也不应仅保留孤立部分。
prohibited_actions: 切断高质量树篱等自然连接
仅保留树篱的孤立部分

evidence.quote: 1Rd. Severing existing natural connections such as high-quality hedgerows. Retaining existing hedgerows alongside back gardens or only retaining isolated sections of hedgerows.

records.title: 公寓不应直接暴露在汽车前灯和尾气中
records.summary: 公寓不应直接暴露在汽车前灯和尾气中。应通过硬景观或软景观创建门槛，为居民提供良好的生活质量。
prohibited_actions: 公寓直接暴露在汽车前灯和尾气中

evidence.quote: Apartments should not be exposed directly to the headlamps and exhausts of cars. A threshold needs to be created with either hard or soft landscaping to offer residents a good quality of life.

records.title: 街角建筑高度
records.summary: 使用较高的建筑来增加街角的地位感。

evidence.quote: Use taller buildings to add stature to street corners.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 禁止将雨水默认排入地下管道
records.summary: 禁止将雨水通过地下管道排走作为默认的水管理策略。
prohibited_actions: 将雨水通过地下管道排走作为默认策略

evidence.quote: 5Rb. Funnelling rainwater away in underground pipes as the default water management strategy.

records.title: Junctions encouraging higher vehicle speeds
records.summary: Do not allow junctions and other accesses into a development to be engineered in a way that encourages higher vehicle speeds.
prohibited_actions: engineer junctions to encourage higher vehicle speeds

evidence.quote: Do not allow junctions and other accesses into a development to be engineered in a way that encourages higher vehicle speeds.

records.title: Only providing dropped kerbs at side road junctions
records.summary: Only providing dropped kerbs at side road junctions, rather than continuous raised crossings, fails to reinforce pedestrian and cyclist priority.
constraints: Continuous raised crossings should be provided to reinforce pedestrian and cyclist priority, not just dropped kerbs at side road junctions.
prohibited_actions: Only providing dropped kerbs at side road junctions instead of continuous raised crossings.

evidence.quote: 2Rc. Only providing dropped kerbs at side road junctions, rather than continuous raised crossings which reinforce pedestrian and cyclist priority.

records.title: 确保自然监视
records.summary: 确保自然监视，使公共开放空间感觉安全、受欢迎。

evidence.quote: 11Gg. Ensuring natural surveillance, so public open spaces feel safe, and welcoming.

records.title: Use crossroads and junctions for placemaking
records.summary: Introduce features or spatial cues at crossroads and junctions that aid orientation and strengthen character.

evidence.quote: 8Gg. Use crossroads and junctions for placemaking. Introduce features or spatial cues that aid orientation and strengthen character.

records.title: 遵循真实期望线的路线
records.summary: 路线应遵循真实的期望线，提供人们想去的地方之间最直接的路径。

evidence.quote:
9Gg. Routes that follow real desire lines, providing the most direct
     paths between the places people want to travel to.

records.title: 禁止切断住宅与绿色基础设施的关系
records.summary: 不得切断住宅与绿色基础设施之间的关系。
prohibited_actions: 切断住宅与绿色基础设施的关系

evidence.quote: Do not sever the relationship between homes and green infrastructure.

records.title: Mix of uses
records.summary: A mix of uses should ensure social activity in the daytime and evening.
constraints: social activity in the daytime and evening

evidence.quote: 3Gb. A mix of uses to ensure social activity in the daytime and evening.

records.title: Improve before you add
records.summary: Consider whether enhancing existing facilities would deliver more value than building new ones.
constraints: Enhancing existing facilities should be considered before building new ones to deliver more value.

evidence.quote: f. Improve before you add. Consider whether enhancing existing facilities would deliver more value than building new ones.

records.section: 12. Back of pavement, front of home
records.title: 避免不良门槛空间
records.summary: 避免人行道与建筑立面之间考虑不周的门槛空间，破坏街道质量、安全和吸引力。
prohibited_actions: 设计不良门槛空间

evidence.quote: Poorly considered threshold spaces between pavement and building façades, undermining the quality, safety and attractiveness of the street.

records.title: 主动选择为便捷选择
records.summary: 自行车和货运自行车停车位应比汽车停车位更靠近商业、休闲和社区建筑入口；学校应提供滑板车和自行车停车位。
constraints: 自行车和货运自行车停车位应比汽车停车位更靠近入口

evidence.quote: 2Gc. The active choice is the easy choice. Provide cycle and cargo cycle parking closer to entrances of commercial, leisure and community buildings than car parking. At schools, provide scooter and cycle parking to help younger children travel actively.

records.title: Plan for realistic levels of demand
records.summary: 根据实际需求规划停车位，防止停车问题扩散到周边街道。
constraints: prevent displaced or antisocial parking on surrounding streets

evidence.quote: c. Plan for realistic levels of demand. Car and cycle parking should match actual local need and prevent displaced or antisocial parking on surrounding streets.

records.title: 先渗透再排放
records.summary: 设计SuDS以自然滞留和渗透雨水，仅多余部分流向调蓄池；避免将溢流管设在设施底部，以免阻碍雨水渗入土壤。
constraints: 仅多余部分流向调蓄池
prohibited_actions: 避免将溢流管设在设施底部

evidence.quote: g. Soak before draining. Design SuDS to hold and infiltrate rainwater naturally. Only the excess should flow to attenuation basins. Avoid placing overflow pipes at the bottom of features — doing so prevents water soaking into the soil.

records.title: 连接人与自然的网络
records.summary: 应将人类活动路线与自然廊道交织在一起，将场地与周边绿色和蓝色基础设施、街道、路径和栖息地连接起来，以提升生物多样性、管理水资源并支持步行、骑行和轮椅出行。
actions: 将场地与周边绿色和蓝色基础设施连接
constraints: 应成为每个新开发项目的决定性特征

evidence.quote: Connect human and natural networks. Weave human movement routes and natural corridors together. Linking your site to surrounding green and blue infrastructure, streets, paths and habitats is essential for boosting biodiversity, managing water, and supporting walking, wheeling and cycling.

records.section: 5. Making the most of what’s there
records.title: 保留树木作为屏障并框景
records.summary: 利用从工厂再开发中保留的树木来屏蔽新公寓建筑，同时新住宅框定场地外的景观。

evidence.quote: Trees retained from a factory redevelopment screen new apartment buildings. New homes frame views beyond the site.

records.title: Frequent benches
records.summary: Frequent benches should be provided to support people with mobility difficulties and make walking between places easier and more inclusive.
constraints: to support people with mobility difficulties
make walking easier and more inclusive

evidence.quote: 3Gh. Frequent benches to support people with mobility difficulties and make walking between places easier and more inclusive.

records.title: 使用LTN 1/20测试隔离需求
records.summary: 应使用措施降低车速和交通量，使在车道上骑行感觉安全；若街道需宽，应确保易于穿越，并使用较高建筑和大树提供围合感。

evidence.quote: b. Test the need for segregation using LTN 1/20. Use measures to slow traffic speeds and reduce traffic volumes, so cycling on the carriageway feels safe. If the street needs to be wide, make sure it’s easy to cross, and use taller buildings and large trees to provide enclosure.

records.title: 提供活跃的临街面
records.summary: 建筑面向街道设置入口和充足窗户，形成活跃的临街面，营造生机勃勃且被良好监视的公共空间。
constraints: 建筑面向街道设置入口和充足窗户

evidence.quote: b. Deliver active frontages. Active frontages are created when buildings present front doors and plentiful windows to the street. They are essential for a lively and well overlooked public realm.

records.title: 底层窗户标注为双向透明玻璃
records.summary: 确保规划申请中将底层窗户标注为“双向透明玻璃”，以保护其免受导致窗户模糊的广告申请影响。
actions: 在规划申请中将底层窗户标注为“双向透明玻璃”
constraints: 底层窗户应保持透明，防止被广告遮挡

evidence.quote: Make sure that planning applications label ground floor windows as ‘two way clear glass’ to protect them from advertisement applications that result in obscure windows being created.

records.title: Frame views toward key features
records.summary: Frame views toward key features within and beyond the site to help people orient themselves and reinforce mental mapping.

将自然路线与人行路线结合
在街道中融入树木、树篱和物种丰富的边缘带

Incorporating trees, hedges and species‑rich verges within streets further boosts biodiversity and helps manage rainwater.

records.title: 理解特色的真正来源
records.summary: 积极的当地特色通常不是来自风格上的装饰，而是来自基本元素：街道和街区结构、地块模式（城市肌理）、绿色和蓝色基础设施、土地利用、建筑形式、体量和材料。把这些做好，独特性自然随之而来。

evidence.quote: c. Understand the real sources of character. Positive local character often emerges not from stylistic flourishes but from the fundamental elements: • street and block structure, • plot pattern (urban grain), • green and blue infrastructure, • land uses, • building form, massing and materials. Get these right and distinctiveness follows naturally.

records.title: 黄灯合理性说明
records.summary: 有时黄灯不可避免。外部因素——如第三方土地所有权——可能限制连通性或限制最佳布局。如果开发仍允许未来连接，黄灯可能是合理的。BHL与Manual for Streets (2007)一致，并得到Homes England的'Streets for a Healthy Life' (2022)支持。并非所有公路当局都采用（或完全采用）这些原则，使得开发商在健康街道考虑事项下难以获得绿灯。在这种情况下，黄灯是合适的，开发商不应受到惩罚。

evidence.quote: Sometimes, an amber light is unavoidable. External factors — such as third‑party land ownership — may limit connectivity or restrict the optimal layout. An amber light may be justified if the development still allows future connections to be made. BHL aligns with Manual for Streets (2007) and is supported by Homes England’s ‘Streets for a Healthy Life’ (2022). Not all highway authorities have adopted (or fully adopted) these principles, making it difficult for developers to secure a green light under the Healthy Streets consideration. In such cases, an amber light is appropriate, and the developer should not be penalised.

records.title: Ensure everyday facilities are nearby

evidence.quote: a. Ensure everyday facilities are nearby. Provide access that meet people’s daily needs within a short, car free trip. A place becomes a community when it has shared spaces where people can meet.

records.title: 确保建筑与周边环境协调
records.summary: 建筑应相互呼应并与所围合的公共空间协调，形成连贯的街景；用建筑围合空间，使其感觉像室外房间，通常更紧凑更好。

evidence.quote: d. Ensure buildings relate well to their context. Buildings should respond to each other and to the public spaces they frame, creating a coherent street scene. Enclose the space with buildings so that it feels like an outdoor room — tighter is often better.

evidence.quote: 1Re. Failing to create sufficient open space alongside retained hedgerows.

constraints: 未来可延伸至未开发或棕地

evidence.quote: 1Ga. Edge‑to‑edge connectivity means providing streets and paths on all sides of a development. Connect to existing routes, create new ones where needed, and ensure streets and paths can be extended in the future where land next to the site remains undeveloped or brownfield.

records.title: 使用周边式街区

constraints: 形成界定清晰的公共临街面和私密背面

evidence.quote: a. Use perimeter blocks. This creates streets with well- defined public fronts and private backs. This structure supports activity, clarity and safety.

records.title: 2026版更新概述
records.summary: 2026版保留健康焦点，进一步推广基于自然的解决方案和主动出行，促进更丰富的绿色基础设施、更大规模的植树和更智能的地表水管理，同时高效利用土地。主动出行也是NHS England预防战略的核心。

evidence.quote: BHL was last updated in 2020 when NHS England steered the last edition to reflect the principles of its ‘Long Term Plan (2019)’. This 2026 version retains the health focus, but does even more to promote nature-based solutions and active travel, for peoples’ wellbeing and to combat climate change.  It promotes richer green infrastructure, more ambitious tree planting, and smarter ways to manage surface water — all while making efficient use of land. Active travel is also central to NHS England’s prevention strategy.

records.title: 按特征和功能命名空间
records.summary: 按特征和功能命名空间，如“公园”、“林地”、“分配花园”或“野花草甸”，而非通用的“公共开放空间”；清晰命名有助于设定使用、管理和设计质量的期望。
prohibited_actions: 不应使用通用名称如“公共开放空间”

evidence.quote: 11Gc. Naming spaces by their character and function — e.g. “park”, “woodland”, “allotments”, or “wildflower meadow” — rather than the generic “POS”. Clear naming helps set expectations for use, stewardship and design quality.

constraints: 边界处理应坚固、高质量

evidence.quote: 12Ga. Defensible space with strong, high quality boundary treatments that enhance the street scene and clearly define private space.

evidence.quote: Use your house types to create a sense of composition. Use materials to bond together very different building forms.

evidence.quote: 2Gb. Cycle friendly streets (see Local Transport Note 1/20) with pedestrian and cycle priority — and protection — across junctions and side streets.

records.summary: 从该地区获取线索，但不要默认模仿。特色应具有联系性和可信度，但不一定是复制。

prohibited_actions: 不要默认模仿

evidence.quote: a. Create a locally inspired or clearly distinctive place. Take cues from the area, but don’t default to imitation. Character should feel connected and credible but doesn’t have to be a copy.

records.summary: 建筑类型可用于强调关键路线。

evidence.quote: Self‑assessment is a practical way to keep BHL front‑of‑mind throughout a project. It helps ensure all 12 considerations are addressed and provides a clear framework for progressing an application through pre‑app. However, when it comes to decision‑making, a self‑assessment carries less weight than an independent assessment.

未能预判行人和自行车的期望路线

evidence.quote: 1Ri. Not responding appropriately to existing movement corridors. Failing to anticipate pedestrian and cyclist desire lines.

objects: 地方骑行和步行基础设施计划

evidence.quote: 2Ge. Deliver or contribute to a Local Cycling and Walking Infrastructure Plan (LCWIP).

records.title: 增加城市高密度示例
records.summary: BHL的另一重大变化是突出更多城市、高密度示例，并将优秀示例数量翻倍。这反映了Homes England在城市更新方面日益增加的工作，以及NPPF和Design and Placemaking PPG中关于建造更多住房、高效利用土地以及高密度方案对支持步行社区和设施服务的价值的强调。

evidence.quote: The other big change to BHL is to highlight more urban, higher density examples, and to double the number of good examples. This reflects both our long-term partner, Homes England’s increasing work on urban regeneration, but also the emphasis in the NPPF and Design and Placemaking PPG on building more homes, making efficient use of land and the value of denser schemes to support walkable neighbourhoods and facilities and services.

records.title: 以目的地为导向
records.summary: 预测期望路线，识别关键目的地之间最直接的路线，沿这些路线设置街道或路径以鼓励步行和轮椅出行，尤其是短途出行。

evidence.quote: 1Gb. Think in terms of destinations. Anticipate desire lines and identify the most direct routes between key destinations. Put streets or paths along these lines to encourage more walking and wheeling, especially for short journeys.

records.summary: 突出这些阳台可形成独特的街角。

records.title: 生物多样性净增益与蓝绿基础设施
records.summary: 2024年2月，生物多样性净增益（BNG）成为规划申请的法定要求。本版鼓励将蓝绿基础设施直接整合到运动廊道中，并确保它们形成连接网络。加强场地边界以外的连接有助于实现更好的BNG成果，绿色基础设施的战略到详细实施反映了Natural England的'Green Infrastructure Framework Principles'。

evidence.quote: In February 2024, Biodiversity Net Gain (BNG) became a legal requirement for planning applications. This edition encourages integrating blue and green infrastructure directly into movement corridors and ensuring they both form connected networks. Strengthening connections beyond the site boundary helps deliver better BNG outcomes and the strategic to detailed implementation of green infrastructure reflects Natural England’s ‘Green Infrastructure Framework Principles’.

records.title: 未预判期望路径

evidence.quote: 3Rf. Failure to anticipate desire lines, particularly between public transport stops and the entrances to buildings, leading to inconvenient, indirect or unsafe routes.

records.title: Land reserved for non-residential uses

records.title: 尽早解决标高变化
records.summary: 尽早检查并设计地块与街道之间的标高差异，不要留到施工阶段。标高变化可提供隐私，但也可能减少自然监视或影响无障碍通行。规划坡道、台阶、种植和门槛，使其适用于所有人。

evidence.quote: b. Resolve level changes early. Check and design level differences between the plot and the street at the outset — don’t leave this to the construction stage. Level changes can provide privacy but may also reduce natural surveillance or compromise inclusive access. Plan ramps, steps, planting and thresholds so they work for everyone.

i. Design for everyone. Create inclusive streets that

                          and cluttered street signage.

Use robust, low maintenance items — hard wearing mounds, stepping stones, re-purposed trunks as climbing features. Distribute play opportunities along routes rather than concentrating everything in one place. Make larger play areas engaging too.

It’s a clear, step‑by‑step process that helps you deliver liveability, and ensures your proposals align with policy. Green light: the proposal performs well against the consideration. A green light allows you to move forward.

constraints: 特色应具有联系性和可信度，但不一定是复制
